citations.description: CI workflow runs `terraform init` and `terraform plan -detailed-exitcode` but no `terraform fmt -check` or `terraform validate`.
The dedicated hermetic test file asserts Terraform SOURCE structure but has no `terraform fmt` or `terraform validate` invocation.

findings.criterion: `terraform fmt -check` and `terraform validate` pass (asserted by a test or CI step); `terraform plan` against the provided account succeeds.
findings.detail: No test or CI step asserts `terraform fmt -check` or `terraform validate` against `infra/terraform/`. The CI workflow `terraform-drift.yml` runs only `terraform init` and `terraform plan -detailed-exitcode`; neither `terraform fmt -check` nor `terraform validate` appears anywhere in the workflow. The unit test file `tests/unit/test_opcert_deploy_infra.py` contains no fmt or validate call. A search across all CI workflows and test files finds zero occurrences of `terraform fmt -check` or `terraform validate` (against the main `infra/terraform/` module). The `terraform plan` against the provided account is covered by both the CI drift workflow and the operator attestation in the deploy comment, but the fmt-check and validate sub-requirements of this criterion are unmet.
findings.remediation: Add a CI step (e.g. in terraform-drift.yml) that runs `terraform fmt -check infra/terraform/` and `terraform validate` (after `terraform init`), OR add a pytest test in `test_opcert_deploy_infra.py` that shells out to those commands (gated on terraform being available, or skipped otherwise but still present as the AC demands).

data.remediation: How to resolve the unmet criteria: for each one, decide whether the work is genuinely incomplete or simply undocumented. If a requirement is already satisfied but the proof is not discoverable from the code alone, add a comment to this ticket that documents the evidence — cite the concrete artifacts that meet the requirement (file paths and line ranges, commands and their output, links, or the reasoning that ties the work to the criterion). The completion verifier reads this ticket's comments, so evidence you record there is taken into account on the next verification. For any criterion whose work is genuinely unfinished, complete it, then re-verify.
